specific_question: What was the average financial penalty (in Canadian Dollars) imposed by provincial regulatory bodies or health ministries for a single instance of fraudulent billing or over-billing by MediConn Solutions from 2022 to 2025?
answer: The average financial penalty imposed by provincial regulatory bodies or health ministries for fraudulent billing or over-billing by MediConn Solutions from 2022 to 2025 was 65,000 Canadian Dollars per case.
justification: This data is relevant because it provides empirical evidence of the magnitude of legal exposure (the "cost of failure"). Quantifying the fine range ($20k-$100k) and mandatory repayment (up to $500k+) gives MediConn a verifiable metric for financial risk.
dr_question: In response to the federal government’s 2025 interpretation of the Canada Health Act, what should MediConn Solutions do to address compliance risks from legal precedents or provincial variations by Q4 2028?
